description: User's ECDH identity private key, wrapped (encrypted) by a KEK derived from password or passkey. Singleton record per user.

main.description: Wrapped identity key for vault encryption.

wrappedKey.description: ECDH P-256 private key wrapped with AES-KW using the KEK.

algorithm.description: KDF used to derive the KEK.

salt.description: Random salt used in key derivation.

iterations.description: PBKDF2 iteration count. Ignored for passkey-prf.
